title: Costco Merch Concept Posters

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a premium fashion campaign board for a fictional Costco Kirkland Signature spring collection in collaboration with a K-pop idol group. Show four stylish young idols wearing oversized Kirkland hoodies, tees, cargo pants, hats, and utility crossbody bags. Use a dark editorial catalog layout with product lineup panels, detail close-ups, membership card, fabric badges, Korean and English campaign copy, and polished retail merchandising photography. The mood should feel like a high-end streetwear lookbook, with charcoal, cream, black, and muted beige tones, sharp product typography, soft studio lighting, and a complete brand presentation grid.
